team.label: The team
team.heading: Built by a team, for your team.
team.title: Strategists, engineers & designers — Canada
team.bio: AIPulse is not a one-person shop. We're a team of AI strategists, engineers, and designers who partner with you end to end — from the first discovery session to long after launch. Different specialists, one shared standard: intelligence engineered precisely for your business.

homeCta.heading: Ready to build your intelligent future?

about.label: About AIPulse
about.hero_title: Built on precision. Driven by partnership.
about.story_p1: AIPulse was founded in Canada with a single conviction: every business deserves AI that is engineered for it — not adapted from a generic template.
about.story_p2: Every engagement begins with a discovery session. We ask about your operations, your team, your goals, and the gaps between where you are and where you want to be. Only then do we design and build.
about.story_p3: The result is an AI system that fits your business precisely — and a partnership that continues long after launch.

precision.title: Precision
precision.body: We engineer, not approximate. Every detail is intentional.

custom.title: Custom-built
custom.body: No templates. No recycled logic. Built for you, only.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.body: We stay engaged well beyond the initial delivery.

longterm.title: Long-term
longterm.body: We measure success in your growth, not project completions.

book.label: Get started
book.heading: Book a Consultation
book.sub: Reserve a paid one-on-one session. Choose a time that works for you.
book.no_slots: No open times in this range. Try another day.
book.signin_required: Please sign in to book a session.
book.expect1: We'll ask about your business and goals
book.expect2: We'll share where AI can create real value for you
book.expect3: An honest, focused conversation — no fluff
book.success_body: Check your email for the confirmation and Google Meet link. You can also see it in your dashboard.
book.cancelled_body: Your session was not booked. You can try again whenever you're ready.

auth.check_email: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
